name: EdwAltFundRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH CTE AS (SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_CUST_SVC_DRVR WHERE SRC_SYS_CD='FACETS') UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN='Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS T JOIN CTE ON 1=1 WHERE T.SRC_SYS_CD='FACETS' AND T.SUBJ_CD='ALTFUND' AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD='IDS' AND T.RUN_CYC_NO <= CTE.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN='N'

Description:

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
JobName:
EdwAltFundRunCycUpdt_EE
EDW Alternate Fund Run Cycle Extract & Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS ALTFUND with a value "N" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is greater than or equal to the current run cycle used for extracting.
buffer
